highlights.text: Last week, that short below zone was the obvious shelf at 5998 and its why I wrote Wednesdsay at 4pm: “Bear case tomorrow: Begins on the failure of 5998...below there we could unwind quite hard and go into “knife catch mode” where we could sell for many hours or potentially a full session”.
My general lean is that we can try a bounce to back-test some of the breakdown zones from yesterday.
After “elevator down” red days like Friday though, price always sees a short squeeze to back-test some of the zones that failed on the way down.

post_title: Is This A Dead Cat Bounce For SPX, Or Bottom? Nov 19 Plan
